customerSupport.title: Customer Support
customerSupport.helpDescription: At SHOPSPHERE, we're committed to providing excellent customer service. Whether you have questions about our catalog, need help with an order, or want to share feedback, our team is here to assist you.
customerSupport.callDescription: Available during business hours for immediate assistance with orders or inquiries.
customerSupport.emailDescription: Send us an email anytime. We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.
customerSupport.faqAnswer1: Absolutely. We guarantee 100% authenticity for every product in our catalog. We source directly from official distributors and reputable houses.
customerSupport.faqQuestion2: What is the difference between EDP and EDT?
customerSupport.faqAnswer2: Eau de Parfum (EDP) has a higher concentration of fragrance oils (15-20%) and usually lasts longer, while Eau de Toilette (EDT) is lighter (5-15%) and better for daily wear.
customerSupport.faqQuestion3: How should I store my perfume?
customerSupport.faqAnswer3: Keep your bottles in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight and humidity to preserve the integrity of the scent.
customerSupport.faqQuestion4: Can I sample a fragrance before buying?
customerSupport.faqAnswer4: Currently, we sell full bottles, but we are working on a discovery set program. Stay tuned for updates!
customerSupport.faqAnswer5: We currently ship across India. Check our shipping policy for details.

footer.aboutText: Discover curated products at SHOPSPHERE. A cleaner, smarter way to shop online.
